titleStmt.title: SII 5.298: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 298. (A.R. No. 10 of 1894). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṭan=ta yum jayamaṭant Aiyum tiruppuyaṅkaḷi liṉitiru
ppa Irunilamum perumai Eyta Eṇṭicaiyuṅ kuṭai niḷaṟṟa maṉṉavarellā
m van=ti ṟaiñca marapiley van=ta muṭi cūṭit teṉkumariye mutalākat tiraik
kaṭale Ellaiyākap pārmuḻutuṅ kayalāṇai paran=tu ceṅkoluḷ vaḷara vi
rasiṁhāsana ttu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷi māmutal matik
kulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ koccaṭaiyapatma rāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrīvallapade vaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu coḷā[ n=ta kaccatu]
rvveti maṅkalattu pattāñceri komapuṟattu Āḷkkoṇṭa
śrīpūmiccāṉiyum śrīde vinaṅkaiccāṉiyum Ivviruvarum teṉkallakanāṭṭu ce
n=ta ṉerikaṭṭikkaḷḷūr Uṭaiyār śrīmulasthā ṉamuṭaiyāṟku vaicca tirunun=tāvi
ḷakku 1- kku ḷ 1- kku Erippatu Āka poliyūṭṭāka Oṭukkiṉa pon Eṭṭaraimāṟipon 3- papa stands for kaḻañcum
nilaiviḷakkukku Oṭukkiṉa Eṭṭaraimāṟi pon 1- papa stands for kaḻañcum Āka pon 4- papa stands for kaḻañcunāṟkaḻañcum paṇ
ṭārattu Oṭukkiṉamaiyil Ittiruviḷakku cantrādi ttavar de var śrīpaṇṭāratte ce
lvitākak kallil veṭṭuviccom tūṟppil śrītarapaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi Iśrībhū mina
ṅkaiccāṉiyum śrīde vinaṅkaiccāṉiyum Ivviruvom Ippoṉ nāṟkaḻa
ñcum śrīpaṇṭārattuk kaikkoṇṭu Ittiruviḷakkuc celuttuvikka kaṭaviy
eṉāṉeṉ śrīvallavapurattu viyāpāri tevarkaṇṭaṉtayāpālaṉṉeṉ
Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvā ci pūvan vayiramekaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai bhāradvā ci mātavaṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu kāśya van kaṇṇaṉ śrīmulasthā
ṉamuṭaiyāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nittakalliyāṇanampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Eṭuttapātam niṟaṇiñcāṉ poṉmāḷikaip piccaṉ Eḷuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ikkoyilil kaikkoḻaṉ Ātittaṉ kaṇṇaṉāna Avani nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻu ttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.298 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
